dataset: Loghub, SecRepo, and Splunk Tutorial Logs

pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh and verifier.py logic where 'Authentication_Events' is checked.
Confirmed via setup_splunk.sh which creates and populates the 'security_logs' index with downloaded SecRepo and Loghub auth logs, and verifier.py checks for it.
Confirmed via verifier.py which expects at least 2 child objects.
Confirmed via verifier.py which expects at least 3 fields.
Confirmed via setup_splunk.sh and install_splunk.sh which configure the Splunk instance with this user.
Confirmed via setup_splunk.sh and install_splunk.sh which configure the Splunk instance with this password.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world authentication logs from SecRepo and Loghub that are populated into the 'security_logs' index during setup. The expected Splunk credentials ('admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!') are verified. Evaluation scripts strictly require the created data model to be named 'Authentication_Events', reference the 'security_logs' index, contain at least 2 child objects, and define at least 3 fields.
